The '''Ion eel''' was a species of [[Eel/Legends|eel]] found on the ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Ion eel appears in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' as one of the minor enemies the player character faces in the game's Hoth level.

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' {{1st}}
